name: Orthogonal Transform
description: Fixed orthogonal rotation matrix Q from SO(d) via QR decomposition. Non-learned, norm-preserving basis rotation for inter-tier communication.

properties.name: seed
properties.description: Random seed for deterministic Q generation

code:
np.random.seed({{seed}})
_orth{{_id}}_A = np.random.randn({{dim}}, {{dim}}).astype(np.float32)
_orth{{_id}}_Q, _orth{{_id}}_R = np.linalg.qr(_orth{{_id}}_A)
# Sign correction: ensure det(Q) = +1 (proper rotation in SO(d))
_orth{{_id}}_signs = np.sign(np.diag(_orth{{_id}}_R))
_orth{{_id}}_Q = _orth{{_id}}_Q * _orth{{_id}}_signs
if np.linalg.det(_orth{{_id}}_Q) < 0:
    _orth{{_id}}_Q[:, 0] *= -1
{{output}} = np.matmul({{input}}, _orth{{_id}}_Q.T)
